---
title: "CV"
page-layout: full
jupyter: website-venv
---


[View or download my CV (PDF)](CV_YongjinLee.pdf)
<br>
<br>
{{< pdf CV_YongjinLee.pdf width=100% height=1000 >}}

<br>
<br>

**Interactive CV**

This interactive visualization shows my CV with the timeline of my research and publications.

```{python}
# | echo: false
# | output: false

import os
import pandas as pd
import altair as alt

# Resolve build directory (works both locally and in Quarto render)
if os.path.isdir("docs"):
    out_dir = "docs/CV"
elif os.path.isdir("../docs"):
    out_dir = "../docs/CV"
else:
    out_dir = "."

os.makedirs(out_dir, exist_ok=True)

# Load data
df = pd.read_csv("research_data.csv")

# Normalize Link: strip whitespace, treat empty as missing; use "" for href when missing
df["Link"] = df["Link"].astype(str).str.strip()
df.loc[df["Link"].isin(["", "nan"]), "Link"] = ""
df["Link"] = df["Link"].fillna("")

# -----------------------------
# Derived columns for visualization
# -----------------------------

# Venue type: Journal vs Conference vs Other


def classify_venue(v):
    if pd.isna(v):
        return "Other"
    v = str(v).lower()
    if "journal" in v or "joperd" in v or "strategies" in v or "sport science" in v or "european" in v or "curriculum studies" in v or "dream&" in v or "woori" in v or "korean journal" in v:
        return "Journal"
    if "aera" in v or "aiesep" in v or "shape" in v or "galashow" in v or "pd" in v or "office of education" in v:
        return "Conference"
    return "Other"


df["venue_type"] = df["venue"].apply(classify_venue)

# Number of authors (collaboration intensity)
df["authors"] = df["authors"].astype(str)
df["n_authors"] = df["authors"].str.split(";").str.len().fillna(1).astype(int)
df["n_authors"] = df["n_authors"].clip(lower=1)

# Has link (DOI or URL)
df["has_link"] = (df["Link"] != "") & (df["Link"].notna())
df["has_link"] = df["has_link"].astype(int)  # 0/1 for encoding

# Period: Completed vs Planned (future years)
current_year = 2025
df["period"] = df["year"].apply(
    lambda y: "Planned" if y > current_year else "Completed")

# Unique collaborators for filter (from authors field)
all_authors = set()
for a in df["authors"].dropna():
    for name in str(a).split(";"):
        name = name.strip()
        if name:
            all_authors.add(name)
collaborator_options = ["All"] + sorted(all_authors)

# Topic order
topic_order = [
    "Teacher Education",
    "Pedagogy",
    "Assessment",
    "Social Emotional Learning",
    "AI in Education",
]
df["topic"] = pd.Categorical(df["topic"], categories=topic_order, ordered=True)

# Venue and venue_type options for dropdowns
venue_options = ["All"] + sorted(df["venue"].dropna().unique().tolist())
venue_type_options = ["All", "Journal", "Conference", "Other"]

# -----------------------------
# Shared filter parameters
# -----------------------------

type_options = ["All", "publication", "presentation"]
topic_options = ["All"] + \
    [t for t in topic_order if t in df["topic"].cat.categories]
role_options = ["All", "Author", "Coauthor", "Presenter"]

type_param = alt.param(value="All", bind=alt.binding_select(
    options=type_options, name="Output: "), name="type_select")
topic_param = alt.param(value="All", bind=alt.binding_select(
    options=topic_options, name="Topic: "), name="topic_select")
role_param = alt.param(value="All", bind=alt.binding_select(
    options=role_options, name="Role: "), name="role_select")
venue_type_param = alt.param(value="All", bind=alt.binding_select(
    options=venue_type_options, name="Venue type: "), name="venue_type_select")
venue_param = alt.param(value="All", bind=alt.binding_select(
    options=venue_options, name="Venue: "), name="venue_select")
collaborator_param = alt.param(value="All", bind=alt.binding_select(
    options=collaborator_options, name="Collaborator: "), name="collaborator_select")
year_min_param = alt.param(value=2018, bind=alt.binding_range(
    min=2018, max=2026, step=1, name="Year from: "), name="year_min")
year_max_param = alt.param(value=2026, bind=alt.binding_range(
    min=2018, max=2026, step=1, name="Year to: "), name="year_max")

# Year brush selection (for bar chart)
year_brush = alt.selection_interval(encodings=["x"], name="year_brush")

# Hover highlight selection
hover = alt.selection_point(
    on="mouseover",
    fields=["title"],
    nearest=True,
    empty=False,
    name="hover",
)

# -----------------------------
# 1. Year summary bar chart (linked selection)
# -----------------------------

year_counts = df.groupby("year", as_index=False).size().rename(
    columns={"size": "count"})

year_chart = (
    alt.Chart(year_counts)
    .mark_bar(color="steelblue", opacity=0.8)
    .encode(
        x=alt.X("year:O", title="Year"),
        y=alt.Y("count:Q", title="Number of outputs"),
    )
    .add_selection(year_brush)
    .properties(title="Outputs by year (drag to select range)", width=700, height=120)
)

# -----------------------------
# 2. Main timeline scatter (hover, filters; fixed point size)
# -----------------------------

main_chart = (
    alt.Chart(df)
    .transform_window(stack_index="row_number()", groupby=["year", "topic"])
    .mark_point(size=280, filled=True)
    .encode(
        x=alt.X("year:O", title="Year"),
        y=alt.Y(
            "topic:N",
            title="Research Area",
            sort=topic_order,
            axis=alt.Axis(labelFontSize=16, titleFontSize=14),
        ),
        yOffset=alt.YOffset("stack_index:Q"),
        color=alt.Color("type:N", title="Output Type", legend=None),
        shape=alt.Shape("role:N", title="Role", legend=None),
        href=alt.condition(
            alt.datum.Link != "",
            alt.Href("Link:N"),
            alt.value(None),
        ),
        opacity=alt.condition(hover, alt.value(1), alt.value(0.35)),
        stroke=alt.condition(hover, alt.value("black"), alt.value(None)),
        strokeWidth=alt.condition(hover, alt.value(2), alt.value(0)),
        tooltip=[
            alt.Tooltip("title:N", title="Title"),
            alt.Tooltip("venue:N", title="Venue"),
            alt.Tooltip("venue_type:N", title="Venue type"),
            alt.Tooltip("authors:N", title="Authors"),
            alt.Tooltip("n_authors:Q", title="Number of authors"),
            alt.Tooltip("role:N", title="Role"),
            alt.Tooltip("year:Q", title="Year"),
            alt.Tooltip("type:N", title="Type"),
            alt.Tooltip("Link:N", title="Link"),
        ],
    )
    .add_selection(hover)
    .transform_filter("type_select === 'All' || datum.type === type_select")
    .transform_filter("topic_select === 'All' || datum.topic === topic_select")
    .transform_filter("role_select === 'All' || datum.role === role_select")
    .transform_filter("venue_type_select === 'All' || datum.venue_type === venue_type_select")
    .transform_filter("venue_select === 'All' || datum.venue === venue_select")
    .transform_filter("collaborator_select === 'All' || indexof(datum.authors, collaborator_select) >= 0")
    .transform_filter("datum.year >= year_min && datum.year <= year_max")
    .transform_filter(year_brush)
    .properties(title="Research timeline", width=700, height=300)
    .interactive()
)

# -----------------------------
# 3. Streamgraph: research trend by year and topic (filtered)
# -----------------------------

stream_chart = (
    alt.Chart(df)
    .transform_filter("type_select === 'All' || datum.type === type_select")
    .transform_filter("topic_select === 'All' || datum.topic === topic_select")
    .transform_filter("role_select === 'All' || datum.role === role_select")
    .transform_filter("venue_type_select === 'All' || datum.venue_type === venue_type_select")
    .transform_filter("venue_select === 'All' || datum.venue === venue_select")
    .transform_filter("collaborator_select === 'All' || indexof(datum.authors, collaborator_select) >= 0")
    .transform_filter("datum.year >= year_min && datum.year <= year_max")
    .transform_filter(year_brush)
    .transform_aggregate(count="count()", groupby=["year", "topic"])
    .encode(
        x=alt.X("year:O", title="Year"),
        y=alt.Y("count:Q", title="Outputs", stack="center"),
        color=alt.Color(
            "topic:N",
            title="Research area",
            sort=topic_order,
            legend=None,
        ),
        tooltip=[
            alt.Tooltip("year:O", title="Year"),
            alt.Tooltip("topic:N", title="Research area"),
            alt.Tooltip("count:Q", title="Count"),
        ],
    )
    .mark_area(opacity=0.8, line=True)
    .properties(title="Research trend by year (streamgraph)", width=700, height=260)
)

# -----------------------------
# Assemble dashboard
# -----------------------------

dashboard = (
    alt.vconcat(
        year_chart,
        main_chart,
        stream_chart,
        spacing=30,
    )
    .add_params(type_param, topic_param, role_param, venue_type_param, venue_param, collaborator_param, year_min_param, year_max_param)
    .resolve_scale(color="independent")
)

# Save standalone HTML to avoid Quarto RequireJS conflict
chart_path = os.path.join(out_dir, "chart.html")
embed_opts = {
    "renderer": "canvas",
    "loader": {"target": "_blank"},  # open mark links in new tab
}
dashboard.save(chart_path, embed_options=embed_opts)
```

::: {#research-timeline-chart style="min-height: 1000px;"}
<iframe src="chart.html" title="Interactive research timeline by year and topic with filters for type, role, venue, and collaborator" style="width: 100%; height: 1180px; border: none;"></iframe>
:::
